analysis:
【今日摘要】
今天市場情緒緊繃，受美伊衝突影響，石油價格大幅上升，美股未來指數下跌。蘋果公司起訴OpenAI違反商業秘密，標誌著人工智慧硬體和軟體之間的競爭加劇。投資者正在觀察中東局勢發展，並準備面對本週股東大會報告的出現。

【結語】
投資者應該保持冷靜，避免過度恐慌。美伊衝突可能會對全球經濟造成影響，但市場也會有反彈機會。投資者應該關注公司的財務表現和預測，避免過度依賴短期市場波動。

【精選個股】
NVDA - Nvidia - Nvidia的股價下跌可能是短期市場波動的結果，但公司的財務表現和預測仍然良好。
AAPL - 蘋果公司 - 蘋果公司的股價下跌可能是短期市場波動的結果，但公司的財務表現和預測仍然良好。
TSM - 台積電 - 台積電的股價下跌可能是短期市場波動的結果，但公司的財務表現和預測仍然良好。

風險提醒：投資市場的波動可能會對投資者造成重大損失，投資者應該謹慎評估風險並做出明智的決策。

items.title: Why Strategy Stock Collapsed In The First Half of 2026
items.summary: The company's Bitcoin accumulation strategy is beginning to unravel.
items.zh_title: 為什麼策略股在2026年上半年崩盤了
items.zh_point: 策略股在2026年上半年出現了嚴重的崩盤，原因是公司的比特幣積累策略開始出現裂痕。

items.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall, Oil Prices Rise Amid New U.S.-Iran Attacks; Nvidia, Micron, Sandisk Near Buy Points
items.summary: futures loom amid U.S.-Iran attacks. Taiwan Semi, Goldman and GE earnings are ahead. Nvidia, Sandisk, Micron are near buy points.
items.zh_title: 道瓊未來指數下跌，石油價格上升 美伊最新攻擊中
items.zh_point: 道瓊未來指數下跌，石油價格上升，美伊最新攻擊持續發酵。台積電、金馬士銀行和通用電氣將公布財報。Nvidia、Sandisk和Micron近期有買點。

items.title: 401(k) Champions and Soaring Value Stocks
items.summary: Most of the education about work-sponsored retirement plans comes from the employer or the plan provider. But what if you could be a source of knowledge too?
items.zh_title: 401(k)贏家和飛躍的價值股
items.zh_point: 在工作贊助的退休計畫方面，多數的教育來自於雇主或計畫提供者。然而，是否你也能成為知識的來源？

items.title: This Vanguard ETF Would Have Quadrupled Your Money Over the Last Decade. History Says Now Is a Smart Time to Invest. (It's Likely to Outperform SpaceX, Too.)
items.summary: This fund has been a strong performer for a long time, and thanks to its diversification, it's less risky than many growth stocks.
items.zh_title: 這支道瓊斯 ETF 在過去十年內將你的錢翻倍。歷史表明現在是投資的好時機。（它很可能會超越太空探索公司 SpaceX 的表現。）
items.zh_point: 這支基金以長期的表現而聞名，透過多元化投資降低風險，成為許多成長股的替代選擇。

items.title: Apple (AAPL) Sues OpenAI Over AI Hardware Trade Secrets
items.summary: Apple (NasdaqGS:AAPL) has filed a federal lawsuit against OpenAI alleging theft of trade secrets tied to its AI hardware work. The complaint centers on claims that former Apple employees took confidential materials and shared them with OpenAI. The filing escalates a public feud involving senior tech leaders and highlights rising rivalry across AI hardware and software. Apple enters this legal fight while its stock trades at $315.32, with the company up 16.4% year to date and 49.9% over the...
items.zh_title: 蘋果公司起訴 OpenAI 違反商業秘密
items.zh_point: 蘋果公司指控 OpenAI former 員工竊取其人工智慧硬體相關商業秘密，並將其與 OpenAI 共享。這起訴訟升級了業界高層之間的公開爭端，並凸顯人工智慧硬體和軟體之間的競爭。

items.title: Stock futures slip after U.S., Iran exchange airstrikes again: Live updates
items.summary: Traders weighed the latest events in the Middle East and braced for a slew of corporate earnings reports due out later in the week.
items.zh_title: 美伊再度交火 股指未來趨勢不明朗
items.zh_point: 美伊再度交火，美國股市未來趨勢不明朗，投資者正在觀察中東局勢發展，並準備面對本週股東大會報告的出現。

items.title: Khosla family agrees to purchase defending Super Bowl champion Seattle Seahawks for $9.612 billion, sources say
items.summary: Paul Allen's estate announced on Feb. 18 that it was selling the team, which is coming off its second Super Bowl victory in franchise history.
items.zh_title: 科斯拉家族同意購買衛冕超級碗冠軍西雅圖海鷹球隊 961 億美元
items.zh_point: 科斯拉家族同意以 961 億美元購買西雅圖海鷹球隊，球隊在去年奪得第二個超級碗冠軍。

items.title: McConnell provides health update after long unexplained absence; says he suffered fall, pneumonia
items.summary: McConnell is the longest-serving party leader in Senate history.
items.zh_title: 麥康奈爾公布健康狀況，承認長期缺席是因為跌倒和肺炎
items.zh_point: 麥康奈爾是參議院歷史上最長時間擔任黨派領導人的人物，近期因長期缺席引起關注。

items.title: I’ve studied more than 200 kids: Parents whose children actually enjoy talking to them do 7 things
items.summary: After studying more than 200 parent-child relationships, parenting expert Reem Raouda shares the habits that help kids feel comfortable talking to their parents — from childhood through adulthood.
items.zh_title: 我研究了200多對父母子女：孩子願意與父母溝通的7個習慣
items.zh_point: 研究指出，父母子女之間願意溝通的關鍵在於父母的行為和態度，包括建立信任、傾聽孩子的需求、避免批評和評判等。

items.title: Sen. Lindsey Graham, influential lawmaker and Trump ally,  dies at 71 after a brief illness
items.summary: Graham, a prominent Republican senator from South Carolina, had just returned from a trip to Ukraine.
items.zh_title: 南卡羅來納州共和黨參議員格雷厄姆去世，享年 71 歲
items.zh_point: 南卡羅來納州共和黨參議員格雷厄姆因短暫疾病去世，享年 71 歲。

items.title: Oil prices rise, stock futures dip after latest flare-up of strikes between U.S. and Iran
items.summary: Oil prices rose and U.S. stock-index futures slipped on Sunday, after the U.S. and Iran continued their tit-for-tat attacks around the Strait of Hormuz over the weekend.
items.zh_title: 石油價格上升 美股未來指數下跌
items.zh_point: 美國與伊朗周末在霍爾木茲海峽爆發軍事衝突，石油價格上升，美股未來指數下跌。

items.title: Why Citigroup is the one to watch when banks report earnings this week
items.summary: Among the largest U.S. banks, Citigroup is expected to show the greatest improvement by one important measure. But it still has a long way to go to reach its own performance target.
items.zh_title: 當銀行業公佈財報時，為什麼要關注花旗集團
items.zh_point: 花旗集團預計將在美國銀行業中表現最大的改善，但仍有很長的一段路要走才能達到自己的績效目標。

items.title: You don’t have to be rich to be financially independent. Here’s how to take control of your money.
items.summary: Relying on a high salary or a hot stock is a dangerous trap. Why the most secure people plan for sudden crisis.
items.zh_title: 你不需要富有就能擁有財務獨立
items.zh_point: 不必依賴高薪水或炙熱的股票，才能擁有財務獨立。最穩定的人為什麼會計劃面對突發的危機？

items.title: Earnings estimates have been following an unusual pattern this time around
items.summary: Analysts generally lower their estimates in the months before earnings. But thanks to the energy and tech sectors, expectations have actually climbed heading into second-quarter results.
items.zh_title: 這次財報預期出現異常模式
items.zh_point: 今年第二季財報前，分析師通常會降低預期，但由於能源和科技業的影響，預期反而上升。

items.title: The No. 1 decision for aging retirees: Stay at home or move into a senior community?
items.summary: Why staying in your longtime home requires more planning than you think.
items.zh_title: 退休老人面臨的關鍵選擇：留在家中還是搬入老年社區？
items.zh_point: 留在自己長期居住的家中，似乎是一個簡單的決定，但實際上它需要更進一步的規劃。

items.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
items.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.
items.zh_title: 美國股市大幅下挫 受中國DeepSeek引發的AI全面大跌影響
items.zh_point: 美國股市大多下跌，納斯達克指數領跌，AI基礎設施製造商股價大幅下跌，多家公司股價跌幅超過10%，Nvidia股價跌幅達16%。

items.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
items.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.
items.zh_title: 紐約黃金交易所黃金、白銀價格下跌
items.zh_point: 紐約黃金交易所黃金價格下跌 1.4%，連續兩天下跌，白銀價格下跌 2.5%，連續三天下跌。

items.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
items.summary: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.
items.zh_title: 中國DeepSeek AI的關鍵知識
items.zh_point: 中國新興企業宣稱已經訓練出高表現的AI模型，但不需要使用最先進的晶片，成本也相當便宜。

items.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
items.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.
items.zh_title: 深度尋找不會讓美國AI巨頭沉沒
items.zh_point: 對於Nvidia、Broadcom等科技巨頭的股價下跌，恐慌情緒可能過度膨脹。

items.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
items.summary: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.
items.zh_title: 科技、媒體與通訊產業匯報：市場話題
items.zh_point: DeepSeek、SoFi 等科技、媒體和通訊產業的最新動態，包括市場分析和投資趨勢。

items.title: Duolingo Is Still Impressive, But No Longer Cheap (Rating Downgrade)
items.zh_title: 杜林戈仍然令人印象深刻，但不再便宜（評級下調）
items.zh_point: 杜林戈雖然仍然是一款令人印象深刻的語言學習平台，但其價格已經不再是最便宜的選擇。

items.title: Ooma: Stock Could Outperform On Above-Average Growth And A Low Valuation
items.zh_title: 歐馬股份：股價有望超越平均成長率並因低估值而上升
items.zh_point: 歐馬股份的股價可能因為公司出色的成長率和低估值而上升，投資者應該關注這個公司的發展前景。

items.title: AH Realty Trust: An Unsafe 8% Dividend, But A Strong Long-Term Buy
items.zh_title: AH Realty Trust：一個不安全的8%股息，但是一個強勁的長期買入
items.zh_point: AH Realty Trust 的 8% 股息看似誘人，但實際上可能存在風險。投資者應該考慮公司的財務狀況和未來發展前景，才能做出明智的決策。

items.title: Similarweb: Large LLM Contracts Represent A New Era For This Analytics Company
items.zh_title: Similarweb：大型LLM合約標誌著這家分析公司的新時代
items.zh_point: Similarweb 這家分析公司因為與大型LLM 合約相關的新業務而受到關注。這些合約可能會為公司帶來新的收入來源，並標誌著公司進入人工智慧分析領域。

items.title: Apple: AI Toll Booth Myth
items.zh_title: 蘋果：人工智慧收費站謠言
items.zh_point: 蘋果公司被指控在未經使用者同意的情況下，利用人工智慧技術收集和分析使用者行為資料，引發對隱私保護的關注。

items.title: Oil prices jump over 3% after Iran declares Strait of Hormuz closed
items.zh_title: 伊朗宣布霍爾木茲海峽封閉 石油價格大幅上升
items.zh_point: 伊朗宣布封閉霍爾木茲海峽，石油價格大幅上升逾 3%，全球油價市場出現波動。

items.title: US stock futures fall amid more Iran strikes; Q2 earnings on tap
items.zh_title: 美股未來指數下跌 美國對伊朗發動更多攻擊；二季度財報即將公布
items.zh_point: 美股未來指數下跌，市場關注美國對伊朗的軍事行動對全球經濟的影響。同時，美國企業將公布二季度財報，投資者將密切關注企業的財務表現和預測。

items.title: EU ministers to debate curbing trade with Israeli settlements
items.zh_title: 歐盟部長將討論限制與以色列定居點的貿易
items.zh_point: 歐盟部長將在會議上討論限制與以色列定居點進行貿易的措施，以表達對巴勒斯坦問題的關注。

items.title: Traffic accident in Mexico leaves 9 dead and 10 injured, four of them Americans
items.zh_title: 墨西哥交通事故造成9死10傷，4人為美國公民
items.zh_point: 墨西哥發生嚴重交通事故，造成至少9人死亡，10人受傷，其中包括4名美國公民。

items.title: Iran expands attacks on Gulf states after US strikes, says Strait of Hormuz closed
items.zh_title: 伊朗擴大對海灣國家的攻擊後，美國轟炸後，霍爾木茲海峽關閉
items.zh_point: 伊朗在美國轟炸後，對海灣國家展開了更大規模的攻擊，霍爾木茲海峽已經關閉，可能會對全球石油供應造成重大影響。
